title: Laser's Fakemon Pack [Cobblemon]
description: Cobblemon addon that adds custom fakemon by yours truly. Has new regional variants, convergent forms, and even brand new Pokémon!
body:
![Laser's Fakemon Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/521f70d4ca8c3b8a53e39c17690d688c91f57144_0.webp)
-------------------------------------------
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/uKXTcxYrmjU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![bulletin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bc97e74f8747c038a166adddab984e15cb8511a.png)

### **_IMPORTANT: This pack has a datapack version and a mod version. If it says "+mod" it means all you have to do is put it in your mod folder. If its the datapack version you put a copy of the ZIP in your world's datapack folder, and a second copy in your resourcepack folder._**

### **_ALSO IMPORTANT: Versions 1.5 and above will require Cobblemon Mega Showdown to access all of its features!_**

This is an addon for the popular Cobblemon mod that adds a bunch of new Fakemon to the game (made by yours truly). It adds new regional forms and convergent evolutions of familiar faces, but also intruduces some brand new Pokemon!

### DISCLAIMER: The custom items will not show up in the creative inventory unless you have the filament mod (they can still be crafted, they just don't show up in the creative inventory or JEI due to datapack limitations). The mod version is just a datapack packaged as a mod, so the same is true for the mod.

![bulletin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bc97e74f8747c038a166adddab984e15cb8511a.png)

## The number of Pokemon in the pack is too large to list here, If you want to learn more about the pack there's a wiki for it on my public [Discord!](https://discord.gg/fkE5s2BARg)

![bulletin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bc97e74f8747c038a166adddab984e15cb8511a.png)
